Girls PG near Osmanpura

Curfew & Caretaker Policy

Discipline is the backbone of Jyoti Girls PG. Our clearly defined curfew rules keep residents safe while maintaining parent confidence.

Daily Curfew Timings

Weekday Schedule

Residents return by 9:00 PM after classes. Attendance is taken at 9:30 PM, followed by study hour until lights-out at 11:00 PM.

Weekend Flexibility

Curfew extends to 10:00 PM on Saturdays for cultural events or mock tests, with prior parent approval.

Special Permissions

Outings for family functions or coaching workshops are granted after written consent and ID verification of the escort.

Caretaker Supervision

  • Female warden resides on-site with two assistants covering 24x7 shifts.
  • Entry and exit are logged in a digital register shared with parents every evening.
  • Night patrols cover each floor at fixed intervals to ensure lights-out discipline.
  • Guardians receive SMS alerts for delayed arrivals or unscheduled exits.

Emergency & Escalation Process

Medical Support

In case of illness, the caretaker accompanies the resident to nearby Osmanpura clinics and updates the guardian instantly.

Fire & Safety Drills

Quarterly drills train residents on safe evacuation routes and assembly points.

Parent Helpline

Dedicated helpline numbers remain active day and night to assist families or handle special requests.

Request the rulebook

Jyoti Girls PG

Safe, comfortable, and well-connected accommodation for girls in Chhatrapati Sambhajinagar.
